markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy, KPIs, and operational tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Renewal hinges on strategic alignment.** The decision, owned by Steph, requires GrowthX to prove content's value by connecting it directly to Udemy's business goals, shifting the focus from traffic growth to conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [**A new "Teams" plan is a top priority.** This new business segment requires a content strategy shift from enterprise to SMBs. Justin will provide messaging details after the kickoff tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
  - [**Content must pass AI detection.** With the old tool (Rytr) gone, Jay will benchmark Grammarly's AI score against past content to set a new human-detection standard.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [**Data integrity is a key blocker.** A September 2025 UTM update skewed GA4 data, making accurate organic traffic and referral analysis difficult. Justin will raise this with Kevin.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

## Topics

### Strategic Alignment & Renewal

  - [**Renewal Decision:** Owned by Steph.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [**Status:** Leaning "yes," but budget is the key variable.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
      - [**Requirement:** GrowthX must demonstrate content's value by aligning it with business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
  - [**New "Teams" Plan:** A major new initiative targeting SMBs.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will provide messaging details after the kickoff tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
  - [**Attribution Gap:** Inability to connect blog content to leads.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
      - [**Goal:** Track demo CTA clicks and blog URLs visited by leads.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
      - [**Blocker:** Marketing Ops has other priorities. Justin will raise this with Kevin.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Content & Data Integrity

  - [**AI Detection Standard:** A new standard is needed to replace the now-defunct Rytr tool.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
      - [**Action:** Jay will benchmark Grammarly's AI score against past content to set a new human-detection goal.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**GA4 Data Discrepancy:** A September 2025 UTM update skewed organic traffic data.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Impact:** Makes accurate analysis of organic and referral traffic difficult.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will raise this with Kevin.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)

### Operational Tasks

  - [**Keyword Research:** GrowthX shared a new list to diversify content beyond the "AI transformation" cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will review the list and integrate it into the scorecard.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [**Internal Linking Map:** GrowthX created a Notion doc to map pillar pages.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will fill in the primary pillar page URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
  - [**Site Speed:** Ongoing technical work is happening, but progress is not in "sprint mode."](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [**Action:** Justin will get an update from Kevin.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [**Localization Experiment:** Two top-performing blogs were translated into five languages.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
      - [**Goal:** Run for one month to identify which languages gain traction before deciding on a broader rollout.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=2131.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jay:** Benchmark Grammarly AI score against past content → provide new human-detection goal.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**Justin:**](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=761.0)
      - [Discuss GA4 data integrity and attribution setup with Kevin.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
      - [Provide messaging details for the new "Teams" plan after tomorrow's kickoff.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
      - [Review new keyword research → integrate into the scorecard.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
      - [Fill in primary pillar page URLs in the Notion internal linking map.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=2007.0)
      - [Get a site speed update from Kevin.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
      - [Share Udemy's general business goals documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/N8zKT4o5iXFg2sREWdmBiM_dezNGWq5d?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
